featuresReviewed.correctness: 5-item sub-nav matches contract; /dashboard/settings redirects via server component.
featuresReviewed.security: Inherits dashboard layout auth gate — no duplicated checks.
featuresReviewed.quality: isActiveSubRoute + resolveActiveHref both pure; 13 unit tests pin behavior including prefix-collision edge cases (sitemap vs site, settings vs settings/billing).

featuresReviewed.correctness: Existing settings UI ported 1:1; rotate-key behavior tightened to hit the server endpoint (closes a silent rate-limit bypass).
featuresReviewed.quality: Old settings-client.tsx deleted so there's no drift between copies.

featuresReviewed.correctness: sonner wrapper exposes 4 methods; defaults applied.
featuresReviewed.security: No user content injected into toast messages except via caller code.
featuresReviewed.quality: App-token classNames keep visual theme coherent.

featuresReviewed.correctness: Native <dialog> + POST /api/sites/rotate-key + toast + router.refresh() flow implemented.
featuresReviewed.security: All rotate traffic routes through the authenticated+rate-limited server endpoint (5/hour per user from M1).

featuresReviewed.correctness: Signup path passes metadata; trigger stamps tos_accepted_at; billing APIs 403 tos_required when null.
featuresReviewed.security: Server-side enforcement in checkout + change-plan cannot be bypassed by client-side banner dismissal. Signup hard-guard prevents network request on bypassed-disabled submit.
featuresReviewed.quality: Placeholder /terms page in place for VAL-TOS-002 link target; M8 replaces with real legal copy.
featuresReviewed.testing: 6 unit tests covering accept-route + billing gates.

sharedStateUpdates.AGENTS.md: No change — M4 added no new boundary rules.
sharedStateUpdates.libraryFiles: No change; next update alongside M5 (new Storage bucket for uploads).

crossMilestoneImpact: M2 billing page moved from /dashboard/billing to /dashboard/settings/billing with a redirect shim at the old URL. Stripe Checkout / Portal return URLs continue to work via the redirect.

M2 billing APIs (checkout + change-plan) gained a tos_required 403 short-circuit. Pre-existing unit tests updated in-place to default-accept tos_accepted_at; dedicated VAL-TOS-004 tests force null to assert the gate.
result: PASS — all automated validators green; 5 UI / browser-flow assertions deferred with documented follow-ups.
